NCO.RollDialog.Title: Neon City Overdrive — Roll
NCO.RollDialog.Hint: Click Trademarks and Edges on character sheets to add Action dice. GM clicks add Danger dice. This pool is shared by all players.
NCO.RollDialog.BaseDieHint: Every check always rolls at least one Action die.
NCO.RollDialog.NoGM: A GM must be connected to update the shared roll pool.
